name: Pasta with Szechuan Spiced Shrimp
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse spinach and remove stems.
2. Peel and seed tomatoes.
3. Chop roughly.
4. Clean and devein shrimp.
5. Heat olive oil in a skillet.
6. Add garlic and sauté for a few seconds.
7. Add shrimp and chili paste to the pan.
8. Cook until shrimp turn pink.
9. Arrange hot cooked pasta on a serving platter or individual plates.
10. Place shrimp over the pasta.
11. In half of the butter, sauté spinach and tomatoes until tender.
12. Stir in the remaining butter, bit by bit, until all butter is melted.
13. Pour equal amounts of spinach-tomato-butter mixture over the pasta.
